name: Service Level Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Service Level Agreement (SLA) defining uptime targets, how availability is calculated, and related service commitments for a cloud service.

fields.label: Effective Date
fields.help: The date the SLA takes effect.

fields.label: Subscription Period
fields.help: The term covered by this SLA (e.g. 'January 1, 2025 – December 31, 2025').

fields.label: Target Uptime
fields.help: The minimum monthly availability percentage Provider commits to (e.g. 99.9). Leave blank if no uptime commitment applies.

fields.label: Scheduled Downtime
fields.help: Planned maintenance windows excluded from availability calculations (e.g. 'Sundays 2:00–4:00 AM UTC').

fields.label: Additional Excluded Minutes
fields.help: Any additional circumstances beyond the standard Excluded Minutes definition that are excluded from availability calculations.

fields.label: Target Response Time
fields.help: The maximum time within which Provider will acknowledge support requests (e.g. '4 business hours'). Leave blank if no response time commitment applies.

fields.label: Support Channel
fields.help: How Customer submits support requests (e.g. 'support@provider.com' or 'https://support.provider.com'). Required if Target Response Time is set.

fields.label: Uptime Credit
fields.help: The service credit Customer receives when availability falls below Target Uptime (e.g. '10% of monthly fees'). Required if Target Uptime is set.

fields.label: Response Time Credit
fields.help: The service credit Customer receives when Provider fails to meet Target Response Time (e.g. '5% of monthly fees'). Required if Target Response Time is set.

fields.label: Modifications
fields.help: Any modifications to the SLA Standard Terms (optional).
